title: nephrodium refractum
intro: Nephrodium refractum, also known as a type of fern, is a plant species that belongs to the family Dryopteridaceae. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antifungal properties. The health benefits associated with Nephrodium refractum include relief from arthritis, digestive issues, and respiratory problems, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate pain. Herbal preparations of Nephrodium refractum include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
